title: IIT Roorkee Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Project Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitr.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 for Project Officer (Admin.) and Project Officer (Technical) posts on a contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: M.B.A., with at least 05 years of relevant experience, M.Tech / M.C.A with at least 10 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Project Officer (Admin.): M.B.A., with at least 05 years of relevant experience. Project Officer (Technical): M.Tech / M.C.A with at least 10 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 03 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Officer posts?
faq.answer: For Project Officer (Admin.), an M.B.A. with at least 05 years of relevant experience is required. For Project Officer (Technical), an M.Tech or M.C.A. with at least 10 years of relevant experience is needed.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Officer posts, with one for Admin. and one for Technical.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Officer roles?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Officer positions ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Officer posts at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The selection process will include an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee, Roorkee, Uttarakhand, 247667.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IIT Roorkee.
